title: [verifier] Implement PR-repair verifier and merge gatekeeper
objective: Implement/prove the verifier component that owns merge decisions: inspect lane status, diff scope, required checks, review state, dirty state, supersession, and mergeability before enabling automerge or merging green PRs.
acceptance_criteria: Verifier checks `rtk meta git worktree status <lane>`, `rtk meta git worktree diff <lane> --base <base>`, PR checks, merge state, draft/review status, and supersession evidence.
Merge/automerge is refused unless branch diff matches intended scope, required checks are green, no blocking review remains, no unrelated dirty state remains, and PR is not superseded.
Verifier can close/regenerate superseded PRs only with explicit replacement evidence.
Verifier emits JSON evidence suitable for `.handoff/pr-repair/queue.jsonl` and final handoff packets.

source_gap_audit.reason: Expanded from .handoff/.idea intent after the initial TASK-PRR set proved too broad.
